elements.label: Wheel Test: Base Entity
elements.desc: Base entity with inherited custom properties.

elements.label: Wheel Test: Derived Entity
elements.desc: Derived entity using $extends. Should inherit wheeltestint, override wheelteststring.

elements.label: Wheel Test: Converted Entity
elements.desc: Uses 'extends' (no $) — WheelChain converts it to $extends. Should inherit both custom props.

elements.label: Wheel Test: Runtime Inherit
elements.desc: Uses 'inherits' (runtime InheritFrom). Phase 7 not implemented — custom props will NOT be inherited.
